---
title: "MD. Monowar Hossain"
about:
  template: solana   # Options: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  image: images/cover.jpg
  links:
    - icon: code-slash
      text: RPubs
      href: https://rpubs.com/md_monowar_hossain
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/mdmonowarhossainapon
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-monowar-hossain-apon/
---

### Short Biography
I aspire to become a statistician and data scientist and plan to pursue a Master of Science at the **Institute of Statistical Research and Training (ISRT)**, University of Dhaka. My interest in statistics stems from a fascination with data-driven storytelling, which motivates me to explore diverse areas of statistics, including biostatistics and sociodemographic analysis.

---

### Explore My Work

::: {layout="[[1,1,1], [1,1]]"}

::: {.card .text-center .custom-box .box-home}
[**Home**](index.qmd)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .custom-box .box-posts}
[**Posts**](posts.qmd)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .custom-box .box-training}
[**Training**](teaching.qmd)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .custom-box .box-research}
[**Research & Projects**](Research & Projects.qmd)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .custom-box .box-about}
[**About**](about.qmd)
:::

:::

### Academic Background

| Degree Name | Group/Major Subject | Board/Institute | Country | Passing Year |
|:--- |:----- |:--- |:--- |:--- |
| **M.S.** | Applied Statistics & Data Science | ISRT, University of Dhaka | Bangladesh | 2026 (Expected) |
| **B.S. (Honors)** | Applied Statistics | ISRT, University of Dhaka | Bangladesh | 2025 |
| **H.S.C.** | Science | Dr. Mahbubur Rahman Mollah College | Bangladesh | 2020 |

<style>
/* 1. OVERALL PAGE WIDTH */
.quarto-about-solana {
  max-width: 900px !important; /* Narrower for better readability */
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important; /* Forces vertical stack */
  align-items: center !important;
  padding-top: 0px !important;
}

/* 2. SMALL TOP IMAGE */
.about-entity {
  margin-top: 5px !important;
  margin-bottom: 0px !important;
}

.about-entity img {
  width: 180px !important; /* SMALL SIZE as requested */
  height: auto !important;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 3px solid #2c3e50 !important;
  padding: 4px !important;
  background-color: white !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important; /* Circle shape looks great at top */
}





/* 3. DASHBOARD BOXES & ROW SPACING */
.quarto-layout-row {
  margin-bottom: 25px !important; /* SPACE BETWEEN TWO ROWS */
  gap: 15px !important;
}

.custom-box {
  padding: 12px !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 55px;
  border: 1px solid #2c3e50 !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #fdfdfd, 0 3px 0 0 #2c3e50 !important;
  border-radius: 4px !important;
  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.custom-box a {
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: #2c3e50 !important;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
}

/* 4. INTERACTIVE COLORS ON HOVER/CLICK */
.box-home:hover { background-color: #0048af !important; border-color: #0d6efd !important; }
.box-posts:hover { background-color: #0053c8 !important; border-color: #198754 !important; }
.box-training:hover { background-color: #005de2 !important; border-color: #ffc107 !important; }
.box-research:hover { background-color: #0068fb !important; border-color: #6f42c1 !important; }
.box-about:hover { background-color: #9bc4ff !important; border-color: #dc3545 !important; }

.custom-box:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 6px 0 0 #0d6efd !important;
}

/* 5. TEXT AREA WIDTH */
.about-content {
  width: 100% !important;
  text-align: left !important;
}
</style>
